A FISHING PARTY ON ELBOW LAKE IN COOK COUNTY OBSERVED A FUNNEL CLOUD AND SNAPPED A PICTURE OF IT AT 245 PM ON JUNE 18TH, 2019. THEY REPORTED THAT THERE WAS A BRIEF PERIOD OF DEBRIS IN THE AIR. AFTERWARDS, THE FISHING PARTY KNEW A LOCAL PILOT WHO WAS ABLE TO CONFIRM TREES WERE DAMAGED IN THE WOODS NORTH OF ELBOW LAKE. THERE ARE NO ROADS IN THE AREA WHERE THE DAMAGE OCCURRED.
